mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO student_favorite_agency_team(user_id, team_id) VALUES(#{userId}, #{teamId})
mapper.select: SELECT team_id FROM student_favorite_agency_team WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.sql: t.id AS teamId, t.team_name AS teamName, t.team_intro AS teamIntro, o.org_name AS orgName, o.logo_url AS logoUrl, o.city AS city, t.service_country_scope AS serviceCountryScope, t.service_major_scope AS serviceMajorScope, COALESCE(SUM(mm.case_count), 0) AS caseCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.success_rate), 2), 0) AS successRate, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.avg_rating), 2), 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mm.response_efficiency_score), 2), 0) AS responseEfficiencyScore, CASE WHEN t.price_min <= 0 AND t.price_max <= 0 THEN '价格待沟通' WHEN t.price_min = t.price_max THEN CASE WHEN t.price_min >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN t.price_min >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(t.price_min, 1))) END ELSE CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 AND GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) < 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), '-', TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE CONCAT( CASE WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(LEAST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END, '-', CASE WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 10000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 10000, 1))), 'w') WHEN GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) >= 1000 THEN CONCAT(TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max) / 1000, 1))), 'k') ELSE TRIM(TRAILING '.' FROM TRIM(TRAILING '0' FROM FORMAT(GREATEST(t.price_min, t.price_max), 1))) END ) END END AS priceTextPlaceholder, 1 AS favorited

FROM agency_team t JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = t.org_id LEFT JOIN agency_team_publisher_rel tr ON tr.team_id = t.id AND tr.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN agency_member_profile m ON m.id = tr.member_id AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.public_status = 'PUBLIC' LEFT JOIN agency_member_metrics mm ON mm.member_id = m.id WHERE t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND t.is_front_visible = 1 AND o.status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select:
SELECT
AND t.id = #{teamId} GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.logo_url, o.city, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope, t.price_min, t.price_max LIMIT 1

SELECT
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student_favorite_agency_team f WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.team_id = t.id ) GROUP BY t.id, t.team_name, t.team_intro, o.org_name, o.logo_url, o.city, t.service_country_scope, t.service_major_scope, t.price_min, t.price_max ORDER BY ( SELECT MAX(f2.created_at) FROM student_favorite_agency_team f2 WHERE f2.user_id = #{userId} AND f2.team_id = t.id ) DESC, t.id DESC
